hero.label: Leafline
hero.title: Which part has a problem?
hero.desc: Select the affected part of your plant and submit a photo for diagnosis.

leaf.label: Leaf
leaf.desc: Spots, discoloration, holes or wilting on leaves
leaf.uploadHint: Take a clear photo of the leaf

root.label: Root
root.desc: Root rot, discoloration or fungal infection
root.uploadHint: Take a clear photo of the root (remove soil first)

fruit.label: Fruit
fruit.desc: Rot, spots, deformity or premature drop
fruit.uploadHint: Take a clear photo of the fruit (including spots)

flower.label: Flower
flower.uploadHint: Take a clear photo of the flower

body.label: Stem / Branch
body.desc: Stem cracks, rot, bark peeling or drying
body.uploadHint: Take a clear photo of the stem or branch
